about.title: THE RUNNER RUNNER STORY
about.text: In a world where speed is everything, only the strategic survive. Join the ultimate competitive race across the neon city streets.

features.title: HIGH SPEED RACING
features.description: Experience the adrenaline of high-stakes racing in beautiful 3D environments.

features.title: POWERUP MASTERY
features.description: Master shields, magnets, and blasters to gain the edge over your competition.

features.title: GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS
features.description: Compete with players worldwide and claim your spot at the top of the rankings.

community.title: RUN THROUGH THE CITY
community.desc: DASH THROUGH FAST-CHANGING STREETS FILLED WITH OBSTACALS TWISTS AND SURPRISES EVERY RUN IS DIFFERENT AND EVERY SECOND COUNTS.

community.title: DODGE EVERYTHING IN YOUR WAY
community.desc: JUMP SLIDE AND REACT FAST TO SURVIVE ONE WRONG MOVE AND THE RUN IS OVER.

community.title: POWER UP YOUR RUN
community.desc: GRAB BOOSTS SHIELDS AND BONUSES MID-RUNUSE THEM WISELY TO GO FURTHER AND SCORE HIGHER.

community.title: BEAT YOUR BEST
community.desc: CHALLENGE YOURSELF TO RUN FARTHER EVERY TIME CLIMB THE LEADERBOARD AND PROVE YOU'RE THE FASTEST.

runners.title: MEET THE RUNNERS
runners.subtitle: FROM STREET ARTISTS TO FUTURISTIC RACERS, UNLOCK A UNIQUE ROSTER OF RUNNERS READY TO TAKE OVER THE CITY.

articles.subtitle: NEWS UPDATES AND STORIES FROM RUNNER RUNNER

items.title: NEW WINTER WORLD UPDATE: ICE CITY ARRIVES!
items.desc: EXPLORE THE FROZEN STREETS OF ICE CITY WITH NEW OBSTACLES, POWER-UPS, AND EXCLUSIVE WINTER CHARACTERS. THE BIGGEST UPDATE OF THE YEAR IS HERE!...

items.title: MEET THE TOP 10 PLAYERS OF JANUARY 2026
items.desc: DISCOVER THE STRATEGIES AND STORIES BEHIND OUR TOP-PERFORMING RUNNERS. LEARN HOW THEY ACHIEVED RECORD-BREAKING SCORES AND DOMINATED THE LEADERBOARDS...

items.title: 5 PRO TIPS TO MASTER ENDLESS MODE
items.desc: WANT TO RUN FURTHER AND SCORE HIGHER? OUR EXPERT PLAYERS SHARE THEIR SECRETS FOR SURVIVING LONGER IN ENDLESS MODE AND MAXIMIZING YOUR COIN COLLECTION...

hero.title: MEET THE RUNNERS
hero.subtitle: EVERY RUNNER TELLS A DIFFERENT STORY. WHO ARE YOU WHEN YOU RUN?

personality: BOLD, CURIOUS, AND FULL OF ENERGY.
EVERY RUN FEELS LIKE AN ADVENTURE.
CLASSIC STYLE WITH A CALM FOCUS.
COOL UNDER PRESSURE, ALWAYS IN CONTROL.
EVERY MOVEMENT IS CONTROLLED AND INTENTIONAL.
DESIGNED TO STAND OUT FROM THE CROWD.
BUILT TO LEAD. DRIVEN TO WIN.

hero.title: WE'D LOVE TO HEAR FROM YOU!
hero.subtitle: GOT A QUESTION, FEEDBACK, OR NEED HELP? WE'RE HERE FOR YOU!

infoBox.title: GET IN TOUCH
infoBox.text: PLEASE FILL OUT THE FORM BELOW, AND WE'LL GET BACK TO YOU AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.

support.title: CONTACT OUR SUPPORT TEAM
support.subtitle: IF YOU NEED PERSONALIZED ASSISTANCE, WE'RE HERE FOR YOU!

cards.title: SUPPORT@RUNNERRUNNER.COM
cards.desc: Available 24/7 via the chat button at the bottom-right of the page. Need instant assistance? Chat with us anytime for quick help!
Prefer to speak with someone? Call us during our support hours to get immediate help.

cards.title: LIVE CHAT
cards.desc: Available 24/7 via the chat button at the bottom-right of the page. Need instant assistance? Chat with us anytime for quick help!

bgSection.title: STAY CONNECTED
bgSection.subtitle: FOLLOW US FOR THE LATEST UPDATES

hero.title: MASTER EVERY POWERUP
hero.subtitle: DISCOVER THE ABILITIES THAT WILL TAKE YOUR RUN TO THE NEXT LEVEL

survive.title: SURVIVE LONGER
survive.subtitle: WHEN THE PATH TURNS BRUTAL, THESE POWERS KEEP YOU MOVING.

shield.title: SHIELD
shield.subtitle: ONE HIT. ZERO SLOWDOWN.
shield.description: ACTIVATE THE SHIELD TO ABSORB AN OBSTACLE WITHOUT BREAKING YOUR STREAK.

blaster.title: BLASTER
blaster.subtitle: CLEAR THE WAY. KEEP THE SPEED.
blaster.description: FIRE UP THE BLASTER AND DESTROY OBSTACLES IN YOUR WAY.

invisibility.title: INVISIBILITY
invisibility.subtitle: MAKE OBSTACLES DISAPPEAR.
invisibility.description: FOR A LIMITED TIME, OBSTACLES VANISH FROM YOUR PATH.

rewards.title: EARN REWARDS
rewards.subtitle: THE FURTHER YOU RUN, THE MORE YOU EARN.
rewards.description: COLLECT COINS AND UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE ITEMS.

magnet.title: MAGNET
magnet.subtitle: PULL COINS FROM ANYWHERE.
magnet.description: ACTIVATE THE MAGNET TO ATTRACT ALL COINS IN YOUR VICINITY.

score.title: 2X & 4X
score.subtitle: DOUBLE & QUADRUPLE YOUR SCORE.
score.description: COLLECT THE 2X OR 4X POWER-UP AND WATCH YOUR SCORE MULTIPLY AS YOU RUN THROUGH THE TRACK. A QUICK WAY TO BOOST YOUR POINTS.

megaCoin.title: MEGA COIN
megaCoin.subtitle: BIGGER PICKUPS. BIGGER REWARDS.
megaCoin.description: GRAB MEGA COINS FOR AN INSTANT SCORE BOOST. ONE PICKUP, MASSIVE VALUE - PERFECT FOR CLIMBING THE LEADERBOARD FASTER.

bonusZone.title: BONUS ZONE
bonusZone.subtitle: ENTER THE TREASURE ROOM.
bonusZone.description: A SECRET AREA FILLED WITH COINS AND NO OBSTACLES.

jumper.title: JUMPER
jumper.subtitle: LAUNCH INTO ADVANTAGE.
jumper.description: HIT A JUMPER TO BOUNCE HIGH ABOVE THE TRACK AND ESCAPE TIGHT OBSTACLES. GAIN A BETTER VIEW, MORE BREATHING ROOM, AND A CHANCE TO GRAB REWARDS FROM ABOVE.

bonusRoad.title: BONUS ROAD
bonusRoad.subtitle: ENTER THE BONUS ROAD.
bonusRoad.description: FIND THE BONUS ROAD AND SHIFT INTO A HIGH-REWARD ROUTE FILLED WITH EXTRA COINS AND BIG SCORING OPPORTUNITIES.

choice.title: WHICH POWERUP WILL YOU CHOOSE?
choice.subtitle: THE RIGHT POWER AT THE RIGHT MOMENT CAN CHANGE EVERYTHING.
